missions.name: Magnetosphere Buoy Reboot
missions.description: A magnetosphere buoy is glitching under Jupiter's radiation belt. EVA across, flash the rad-hardened firmware, bring back the data logs.

missions.name: Io Torus Sulfur Probe
missions.description: The sulfur-monitoring probe in the Io plasma torus is offline. Replace the ion-pitted mass analyzer and realign the antenna.

missions.name: Orbital Asset Servicing
missions.description: On-orbit asset is throwing faults across multiple subsystems. Diagnostics inconclusive — EVA out, find the broken parts, patch them in place.

missions.name: Galilean Telescope Phasing
missions.description: The moon-watching telescope is out of phase after a radiation flush of the actuators. EVA, read the wavefront sensor, walk each segment in by hand.
